# PaySentry

> Payment control plane for AI agents — spending limits, circuit breakers, and audit trails for x402, MCP, and autonomous agent payments.

- npm: [@paysentry/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/core)
- GitHub: [mkmkkkkk/paysentry](https://github.com/mkmkkkkk/paysentry)
- License: MIT

## Docs

- [Full API Reference](https://mkyang.ai/paysentry/llms-full.txt): Complete types, classes, methods, and examples for all 10 packages
- [GitHub README](https://github.com/mkmkkkkk/paysentry/blob/main/README.md): Latest documentation, architecture, and roadmap
- [npm @paysentry/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/core): Core types and utilities
- [npm @paysentry/control](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/control): Policy engine — rules, budgets, approval chains
- [npm @paysentry/observe](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/observe): Spend tracking, analytics, anomaly detection
- [npm @paysentry/protect](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/protect): Dispute resolution, provenance, recovery
- [npm @paysentry/sandbox](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/sandbox): Mock x402/ACP/AP2 for testing
- [npm @paysentry/x402](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/x402): x402 protocol adapter with circuit breakers
- [npm @paysentry/wallet](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/wallet): Wallet abstraction layer
- [npm @paysentry/mcp](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/mcp): MCP server — 10 tools for AI agent payment control
- [npm @paysentry/a2a](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/a2a): Agent-to-agent payments — intents, mandates, escrow
- [npm @paysentry/dashboard](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@paysentry/dashboard): JSON API + SSE event stream for monitoring

## Install

```bash
npm install @paysentry/core @paysentry/control @paysentry/observe
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { PolicyEngine, blockAbove, requireApprovalAbove, allowAll } from '@paysentry/control';
import { createTransaction, type AgentId, type PolicyId } from '@paysentry/core';

const engine = new PolicyEngine();

engine.loadPolicy({
  id: 'production' as PolicyId,
  name: 'Production Controls',
  enabled: true,
  rules: [
    blockAbove(1000, 'USDC'),
    requireApprovalAbove(100, 'USDC'),
    allowAll(),
  ],
  budgets: [
    { window: 'daily', maxAmount: 500, currency: 'USDC' },
  ],
});

const tx = createTransaction({
  agentId: 'agent-001' as AgentId,
  amount: 25.00,
  currency: 'USDC',
  recipient: 'api.openai.com',
  protocol: 'x402',
});

const result = engine.evaluate(tx);
// result.action: 'allow' | 'deny' | 'require_approval' | 'flag'
```
